children.heading: Board
children.label: 1 Board
children.text: The term “Board” means the United Soybean Board established under .section 6304(b) of this title

children.heading: Commerce
children.label: 2 Commerce
children.text: The term “commerce” includes interstate, foreign, and intrastate commerce.

children.heading: Committee
children.label: 3 Committee
children.text: The term “Committee” means the Soybean Program Coordinating Committee established under .section 6304(g) of this title

children.heading: Consumer information
children.label: 4 Consumer information
children.text: The term “consumer information” means information that will assist consumers and other persons in making evaluations and decisions regarding the purchase, preparation, and use of soybeans or soybean products.

children.heading: Department
children.label: 5 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Agriculture.

children.label: A
children.text: except as provided in subparagraph (B), any person buying or otherwise acquiring from a producer soybeans produced by such producer; or

children.label: B
children.text: the Commodity Credit Corporation, in any case in which soybeans are pledged as collateral for a loan issued under any price support loan program administered by the Commodity Credit Corporation.

children.heading: Industry information
children.label: 7 Industry information
children.text: The term “industry information” means information and programs that will lead to the development of new markets, new marketing strategies, or increased efficiency for the soybean industry, and activities to enhance the image of the soybean industry.

children.heading: Marketing
children.label: 8 Marketing
children.text: The term “marketing” means the sale or other disposition of soybeans or soybean products in any channel of commerce.

children.label: A
children.text: except as provided in subparagraph (B), the sales price or other value received by a producer for soybeans after adjustments for any premium or discount based on grading or quality factors, as determined by the Secretary; or

children.label: B
children.text: for soybeans pledged as collateral for a loan issued under any price support loan program administered by the Commodity Credit Corporation, the principal amount of the loan.

children.heading: Order
children.label: 10 Order
children.text: The term “order” means an order issued under .section 6303 of this title

children.heading: Person
children.label: 11 Person
children.text: The term “person” means any individual, group of individuals, partnership, corporation, association, cooperative, or any other legal entity.

children.heading: Producer
children.label: 12 Producer
children.text: The term “producer” means any person engaged in the growing of soybeans in the United States who owns, or who shares the ownership and risk of loss of, such soybeans.

children.heading: Promotion
children.label: 13 Promotion
children.text: The term “promotion” means any action, including paid advertising, technical assistance, and trade servicing activities, to enhance the image or desirability of soybeans or soybean products in domestic and foreign markets, and any activity designed to communicate to consumers, importers, processors, wholesalers, retailers, government officials, or others information relating to the positive attributes of soybeans or soybean products or the benefits of importation, use, or distribution of soybeans and soybean products.

children.label: A
children.text: that is organized and operating within a State;

children.label: B
children.text: that receives voluntary contributions and conducts soybean promotion, research, consumer information, or industry information programs; and

children.label: C
children.text: that meets criteria established by the Board as approved by the Secretary relating to the qualifications of such entity to perform duties under the order and is recognized by the Board as the soybean promotion and research entity within the State.

children.heading: Research
children.label: 15 Research
children.text: The term “research” means any type of study to advance the image, desirability, marketability, production, product development, quality, or functional or nutritional value of soybeans or soybean products, including any research activity designed to identify and analyze barriers to export sales of soybeans and soybean products.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 16 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: Soybean products
children.label: 17 Soybean products
children.text: The term “soybean products” means products produced in whole or in part from soybeans or soybean by-products.

children.heading: Soybeans
children.label: 18 Soybeans
children.text: The term “soybeans” means all varieties of Glycine max or Glycine soya.

children.heading: State
children.label: 19 State
children.text: The terms “State” and “United States” consist of the 50 States of the United States of America, the District of Columbia, and the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.
